title: Principal Plant Manager at NHPC Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at NHPC Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, NHPC Holdings Services in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About NHPC Holdings Services:
NHPC Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC Holdings Services!
